headline: How AI Infrastructure Deals And Rich Valuation At Jabil (JBL) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent days, Jabil has been highlighted for its role in the past year building AI infrastructure hardware, aided by a broader manufacturing portfolio, capacity additions, and new contracts with large cloud hyperscale customers that are expected to support operating margin improvement into fiscal 2027. At the same time, third-party assessments now flag Jabil as trading well above some intrinsic value estimates amid insider share sales, raising questions about how much of its AI-related...

headline: Jabil: Margin Expansion Is Just Beginning
